name: removeSpaces
spec: Return text with all space characters removed.
prompt: Implement a single JADE method with signature `removeSpaces(text: String) -> String`. Return text with all space characters removed. Return only the method code.

name: quarterOfYear
spec: Return the quarter number 1 through 4 for the given month 1 through 12.
prompt: Implement a single JADE method with signature `quarterOfYear(month: Integer) -> Integer`. Return the quarter number 1 through 4 for the given month 1 through 12. Return only the method code.

name: laterTimeStamp
spec: Return the later of the two TimeStamp values.
prompt: Implement a single JADE method with signature `laterTimeStamp(a: TimeStamp, b: TimeStamp) -> TimeStamp`. Return the later of the two TimeStamp values. Return only the method code.

name: simpleInterest
signature: simpleInterest(principal: Decimal, ratePercent: Decimal, years: Integer) -> Decimal
spec: Return simple interest using principal * ratePercent / 100 * years.
prompt: Implement a single JADE method with signature `simpleInterest(principal: Decimal, ratePercent: Decimal, years: Integer) -> Decimal`. Return simple interest using principal * ratePercent / 100 * years. Return only the method code.

name: addIntegers
spec: Return the sum of a and b.
prompt: Implement a single JADE method with signature `addIntegers(a: Integer, b: Integer) -> Integer`. Return the sum of a and b. Return only the method code.

name: totalStringLength
spec: Return the sum of the lengths of all strings in the array. Return 0 for an empty array.
prompt: Implement a single JADE method with signature `totalStringLength(values: StringArray) -> Integer`. Return the sum of the lengths of all strings in the array. Return 0 for an empty array. Return only the method code.

name: compareTextLength
spec: Return -1 if a is shorter than b, 0 if they have equal length, and 1 if a is longer than b.
prompt: Implement a single JADE method with signature `compareTextLength(a: String, b: String) -> Integer`. Return -1 if a is shorter than b, 0 if they have equal length, and 1 if a is longer than b. Return only the method code.

name: exactlyOneTrue
signature: exactlyOneTrue(a: Boolean, b: Boolean, c: Boolean) -> Boolean
spec: Return true if exactly one input is true.
prompt: Implement a single JADE method with signature `exactlyOneTrue(a: Boolean, b: Boolean, c: Boolean) -> Boolean`. Return true if exactly one input is true. Return only the method code.

name: removeCharacter
spec: Return text with all occurrences of ch removed.
prompt: Implement a single JADE method with signature `removeCharacter(text: String, ch: Character) -> String`. Return text with all occurrences of ch removed. Return only the method code.

name: containsLowercase
spec: Return true if text contains at least one ASCII lowercase letter a through z.
prompt: Implement a single JADE method with signature `containsLowercase(text: String) -> Boolean`. Return true if text contains at least one ASCII lowercase letter a through z. Return only the method code.
